summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Guggenheim Securitized Income ETF (GISC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund provides active management to a broad portfolio of securitized fixed income securities from global developed and emerging markets. It holds both investment grade and junk bonds of broad maturities. GISC was launched on Jun 15, 2026 and is issued by Guggenheim.

data.title: The Structured Credit Advantage: High Yields, Low Defaults
data.text: Considering how complex the macroeconomic picture has become this year, advisors and investors may want to consider any and all portfolio tools available to them.

data.title: Guggenheim Returns to ETF Market With Two New Income Funds
data.text: On Monday, June 15, Guggenheim Investments debuted a pair of new fixed income ETFs. Each of these new funds offers an active take on the fixed income space.

data.title: Guggenheim Investments Launches Two Active Fixed-Income ETFs Built for Income
data.text: NEW YORK, June 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Guggenheim Investments, a global asset management company with more than $362 billion in total assets,¹ today announced the launch of two actively managed f...
